expected.notes: H-1B holder between jobs triggers unemployment rule; is_nra=no because h1b stage always yields resident status.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'h1b_unemployment'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.employment_status in ['not_employed', 'between_jobs']
  - answers.stage eq h1b
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
